import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Keyboard, BarChart3, Lightbulb, Timer, TrendingUp, Users, Zap, Shield, Github, Linkedin } from 'lucide-react'; const HomePage: React.FC = () => { const features = [ { icon: , title: 'Comprehensive Analysis', description: 'Analyze 17 key metrics including effort, distance, same-finger bigrams, and ergonomic factors.', }, { icon: , title: 'Smart Recommendations', description: 'Get personalized layout suggestions based on your typing preferences and usage patterns.', }, { icon: , title: 'Typing Tests', description: 'Measure your performance across different layouts and identify areas for improvement.', }, { icon: , title: 'Real-time Design', description: 'Create and modify keyboard layouts with instant analysis and live typing tests.', }, ]; const popularLayouts = [ { name: 'QWERTY', type: 'Traditional', description: 'The standard layout used worldwide' }, { name: 'Dvorak', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Optimized for typing efficiency' }, { name: 'Colemak', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Easy to learn, efficient alternative' }, { name: 'Colemak-DH', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Improved version addressing center column issues' }, ]; return (

layoutgod

{features.map((feature, index) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

))}
{/* Metrics Overview */}

17 Key Metrics Analyzed

We analyze every aspect of keyboard ergonomics and efficiency

Effort & Distance

Total typing strain and finger travel distance over representative text

Finger Balance

Pinky usage, off-home percentages, and finger-specific measurements

Bigram Analysis

Same-finger bigrams, skips, lateral stretches, and awkward movements

Flow & Rhythm

Hand alternation, rolls, redirects, and natural typing patterns

Ergonomic Factors

Pinky scissors, two-row jumps, and difficult key combinations

Key Distribution

Column usage patterns and hard-to-reach key percentages

{/* Popular Layouts */}

Popular Keyboard Layouts

Explore and compare the most widely-used keyboard layouts

{popularLayouts.map((layout, index) => (

{layout.name}

{layout.type}

{layout.description}

))}

); }; export default HomePage;
